comment: Self-arming native-compiler ratchet (impl-plan T0.2). native_files lists corpus models (rel paths) the native path compiles and produces bit-identical mjModels for; native_count is the floor. The differential test fails if a listed file regresses to fallback or diverges, if any claimed-native file diverges, or if the total native count drops below the floor. Growing native_supported.h (NC1) moves this ratchet up. NC1 rigid-body slice landed: compiler/option/size/statistic/visual blocks, default classes, the body tree (nesting + include-merged worldbody), explicit inertials, PRIMITIVE geoms (sphere/capsule/cylinder/box/ellipsoid/plane) with closed-form mass/inertia + InertiaFromGeom + per-body BVH, all five orientation forms (quat/axisangle/xyaxes/zaxis/euler + degree/eulerseq), full inertia eigendecomposition, all four joint types + freejoint (dof trees, ComputeSparseSizes nM/nD/nB/nC, sparse maps, qpos0/qpos_spring, simple-body demotions), nuser_* + user arrays. Not yet native (still fall back): mesh/hfield/material geoms, sites/cameras/lights, keyframes, contact/equality/tendon/actuator/sensor, mocap, frames-as-containers.
